fishing.empty_line: {player}: You reel in an empty line.

fishing.bait_no_bait_set: {player}: You don't have any bait set.
fishing.sell_all_sack_empty: Your sack is empty. You have no fish to sell.
fishing.sell_fish_not_found: There were no '{name}' found in your sack.
fishing.sold_single_fish: You sold a {name} for ${price:.2f}! Your new balance is ${new_balance:.2f}.
fishing.eat_fish_not_found: There were no '{name}' found in your sack.
fishing.bait_no_fish_to_use: Your sack is empty. You have no fish to use as bait.
fishing.bait_not_found: There were no '{bait_name}' found in your sack.
fishing.bait_set_next: You will use a {bait_name} as bait for your next catch.
fishing.bait_already_set: You already have a bait set: {bait_name}.

drink.no_beer: {player}: You have no beer to drink.
drink.no_beer_named: You don't have any {beer_name} to drink.

flip.no_balance: {player}: You have no balance to gamble.
flip.invalid_amount: {player}: Invalid amount. Please enter a valid number.
flip.amount_must_be_positive: No way jose, pick a number greater than 0.
flip.insufficient_funds: Insufficient funds. Your current balance is ${current_balance:.2f}.
flip.win_heads: You flipped heads and won ${amount:.2f}! Your new balance is ${new_balance:.2f}.{chance_suffix}
flip.lose_tails: You flipped tails and lost ${amount:.2f}. Your new balance is ${new_balance:.2f}.{chance_suffix}

blackjack.usage: {player}: Usage: blackjack <bet|all> | blackjack hit | blackjack stand | blackjack double
blackjack.invalid_amount: Invalid amount. Please enter a valid number.
blackjack.insufficient_funds: Insufficient funds. Your current balance is ${current_balance:.2f}.
blackjack.double_not_allowed: You can only double down as your first move.
blackjack.game_already_active: You already have an active blackjack hand in this session.
blackjack.started: Blackjack started. Bet: ${bet:.2f}. Your hand: {player_hand} ({player_value}). Dealer: {dealer_up}, ?
blackjack.no_active_game: You have no active blackjack hand in this session.
blackjack.bust: Bust. Your hand: {player_hand} ({player_value}). You lose ${bet:.2f}. Balance: ${new_balance:.2f}.
blackjack.push_blackjack: Push. Both you and dealer have blackjack. Your bet is returned. Balance: ${new_balance:.2f}.
blackjack.dealer_blackjack: Dealer has blackjack. You lose ${bet:.2f}. Balance: ${new_balance:.2f}.

dice.insufficient_funds: Insufficient funds. Your current balance is ${current_balance:.2f}.
dice.no_balance: {player}: You have no balance to gamble.
dice.invalid_guess: Invalid guess. Use 'high', 'low', or a number 1-6.

inventory.empty: {player}: Rummaging through your inventory, you find nothing but dust.

open.no_cases: {player}: You have no cases to open.
open.no_case_named: You don't have a {case_name} to open.
open.opened_case: You opened a {case_name} and got a {item_name} worth {price}! You sell it and pocket the change.
open.opened_pokemon_pack: You opened {case_name} and pulled {item_name} ({rarity}) from {set_name} worth ${price:.2f}!
open.api_error: Couldn't reach card data service right now. Try opening again in a bit.
open.cs_api_error: Couldn't reach case data service right now. Try opening again in a bit.

smoke.no_tobacco_named: You don't have any {tobacco_name} to chuff.

link.cannot_link_self: Cannot link an account to itself.
link.already_linked_different_ids: Cannot link accounts that are already linked to different account IDs.

ship.provide_name: {player}: Please provide a name to ship with!

trophy.empty_case: {player}: Your trophy case is empty. Use trophy add <fish_name> to add fish!
trophy.number_must_be_numeric: {player}: Trophy number must be a number.

shop.no_items_available: {player}: No items available in the shop.
shop.buy_no_item_specified: {player}: Please specify an item to buy.
shop.rods_shortcut_help: View available fishing rods in the shop.
shop.item_not_found: The shopkeeper sighs and says: 'I don't have that item.'
shop.max_quantity_reached: You can only have {max_count} of this item at a time.
shop.insufficient_funds: The shopkeeper says: 'Isn't that too rich for your blood?'
shop.purchase_success: You bought {quantity} x '{item_name}'. Your new balance is ${money_left}.
shop.no_items_in_category: No items available in this category.
shop.nothing_for_you: The shopkeeper says: 'I don't have anything for you.'

translate.usage: Usage: !translate <from> <to> <text>  e.g. !translate en zh nice gloves
translate.unknown_lang: Unknown language '{lang}'. Try: en, zh, es, fr, de, it, nl, ru, ja, tr, sv, ko, pl, pt, hi
translate.label: translation
translate.no_last_message: No recent message to translate. Send a chat message first.

slots.invalid_amount: {player}: Invalid amount. Please enter a valid number.
slots.insufficient_funds: Insufficient funds. Your current balance is ${current_balance:.2f}.
slots.no_balance: {player}: You have no balance to gamble.
slots.win_three: JACKPOT! Three of a kind. You win ${win_amount:.2f}!
slots.win_two: Nice! Two matching symbols. You win ${win_amount:.2f}!

pokedex.empty: {player}: Your Pokedex is empty. Open some Pokemon packs first.
pokedex.summary: {player}: Pokedex discovered {total} unique cards. By region: {regions}

errors.command_not_found_with_suggestion: {player}: Command '{command}' not found. Did you mean '{suggestion}'?
errors.spam_cooldown: {player}: Slow down. You're on cooldown for {seconds}s.

help_texts.cast: Cast your fishing rod to catch a fish or item. (alias: fish, gofish)
help_texts.sack: Display the contents of your fishing sack. (alias: bag)
help_texts.eat: Eat a fish from your sack.
help_texts.sell: Sell a fish from your sack or 'all' fish.
help_texts.bait: Use a fish as bait to increase your chances of catching a bigger one. 'last' to use the last fish in your sack, 'clear' to clear bait.
help_texts.shop: List the categories available, and items in 'shop <category>'.
help_texts.buy: Buy an item from the shop.
help_texts.rods: View available fishing rods in the shop.
help_texts.flip: Flip a coin to gamble an amount or 'all' for your balance. (alias: gamble, coinflip)
help_texts.blackjack: Play one-player blackjack: blackjack <bet|all>, blackjack hit, blackjack stand, blackjack double.
help_texts.dice: Roll a dice (1-6) and bet on high (4-6), low (1-3), or an exact number. Usage: dice <bet|all> high|low|1-6. (alias: roll)
help_texts.balance: Display the player's current balance. (alias: bal, money)
help_texts.top: Display the top players in the economy. (alias: leaderboard, topplayers)
help_texts.help: Display the list of available commands or help for a specific command. (alias: commands)
help_texts.slots: Spin a slot machine: slots <bet|all>. (alias: slot, spin)
help_texts.pokedex: Show discovered Pokemon cards grouped by region.
